expected_high_risk_blockers: Missing complete FEVER evidence source or candidate pools
Proxy instability across model snapshots or materialization policies

calibrated_proxy_supported: Calibration gates passed on heldout rows
metric_bridge_support: Bridge fit satisfying sign, rank, residual, and ESS gates
paper_grade_evidence: Accepted bridge/proxy/validation package matching the paper claim
scoped_multi_benchmark_selector_superior: Route4-6 dependencies required by the intended paper claim
vinfo_proxy_supported: Proxy drift and stability gates passed

parallelizable_routes.work: Bridge protocol design, annotation rubric design, and baseline registry can proceed in parallel before evidence generation.
Fixed-model proxy specification and validation rubric preparation can proceed in parallel.

required_datasets.need: Existing candidate pools plus future Route4-compatible sufficiency labels or adjudication.
Complete evidence source, candidate pools, and evaluator records before first-stratum bridge use.
Only if predeclared before selector-superiority execution.

Pinned deployed-model or fixed-model endpoint with token logprobs

continue: Required real data and evaluator resources present
escalate: Live API budget or endpoint approval needed
stop: Utility is circular or derived from logloss
Evaluator lacks token logprobs where required
Claim wording asserts target evidence as completed
